bench_setup.notes: ADC loopback: PC0 (GPIO output) drives high/low, PC1 (ADC1_IN11, analog) reads back via wire. 5 successful high+low cycles required for PASS. Thresholds: high > 3000 counts, low < 500 counts (12-bit, 3.3V). detail0 = pass_count. FAIL: error_code=0x01 (high read too low, detail0=ADC value) or 0x02 (low read too high, detail0=ADC value). ADC1 classic F4 register map, PCLK2/2=8MHz clock, 480-cycle sample time.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull. Drives 3.3V (high) or 0V (low). Wire: PC0 → PC1.
ADC1_IN11, analog mode, no pull. Wire: PC0 → PC1.
